title: Make a Freedom of Information (FOI) request to Homes England
body: "  Read about the Freedom of Information (FOI) Act and how to make a request.   Check our previous releases to see if we’ve already answered your question.   Make a new request by contacting us.     By post:  Information governance team Legal services Homes England 10 South Colonnade Canary Wharf London E14 4PU United Kingdom  By email:  infogov@homesengland.gov.uk  By telephone:  0300 1234 500  "
